title: leucocoma albens
intro: Leucocoma albens, also known as the White Leucocoma, is a shrub species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. Leucocoma albens is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a paste or ointment to treat various ailments.
